title: INF-2 KV cache UI knob (quant + prefix TTL + occupancy display)
goal: KV cache UI in Inference Lab per AC-INFER-LAB-UI-TOGGLES: quant-level picker (none/q4/q8/q4_q8_mix), prefix-cache TTL slider, live occupancy bar (bytes used / capacity + hit rate), evict-all button. Hidden when capabilities.supportsKvQuantization == None.
expected_diff_shape: New Svelte component app/src/components/inference_lab/KvCachePanel.svelte + store; integration into InferenceLab parent view.
implementation_notes: Per AC-INFER-LAB-UI-TOGGLES + AC-MODEL-RUNTIME-CONTROL-PANEL field set: KV occupancy displayed live in panel; quant picker writes through to settings.exec_policy.kv_cache.quantization. KvCachePanel.svelte: select dropdown for KvQuantSupport (None|Q4|Q8|Q4Q8Mix; mapped from capability set); slider for prefix_cache_ttl_seconds (30..3600); live occupancy bar (polls kernel_model_runtime_kv_occupancy every 2s); hit-rate badge; [Evict all] button calls kernel_model_runtime_kv_evict_all. Per AC-INFER-LAB-UI-TOGGLES "hidden, not greyed": when supportsKvQuantization == None, hide the quant picker (kept prefix TTL slider as long as supportsKvPrefixCache == true). A/B compare per AC-INFER-LAB-UI-AB-COMPARE: pick a generation prompt, render side-by-side gen output at current quant vs proposed quant.
proof_commands: cd app && pnpm exec playwright test --grep kv_cache_panel
risk_if_missed: INF-2 UI knob missing; operator cannot tune KV cache through Inference Lab.
validator_focus: Hidden-not-greyed when unsupported; live occupancy actually updates; A/B compare flow present.

builder_handoff_correction_20260525.operator_instruction: Operator clarified that completed/pass-like states were not validator-reviewed and instructed Kernel Builder to mark everything ready for validator handoff except the blocked item.
builder_handoff_correction_20260525.current_interpretation: Kernel Builder implementation handoff readiness only; no WP/Integration Validator pass or validator-reviewed completion is claimed.

lifecycle.ready_for_validation_reason: Kernel Builder believes implementation/supporting evidence is ready for Integration Validator handoff; validator review remains pending.

minimum_controls: Live occupancy polling does not flood IPC (every 2s cap).
Evict-all button confirmation dialog (prevent accidental cache wipe under load).

implementation_record.summary: MT-094 implemented the KV cache UI knob as a React TSX panel (same Svelte->TSX defect class as MT-091/098/102/105/124). Quant picker driven by quantOptionsFor() capability cascade (none/q4/q8/q4_q8_mix), prefix-cache TTL slider (30-3600s), live occupancy bar polling every 2s, evict-all button with confirmation dialog. Hidden (display:none) when neither supportsKvQuantization nor supportsKvPrefixCache is declared. All mutations dispatch through kernel_model_runtime_kv_* Tauri commands (MT-093) which preflight via KernelActionCatalogV1.
contract_drift: Owned files declared Svelte components and a Svelte-style store; app stack is React/TSX. Implemented as KvCachePanel.tsx + kv_cache.ts IPC binding (React hooks subsume the Svelte store role). Same defect class as MT-091.
Proof command listed `pnpm run typecheck` (no such script); substituted `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit`.
Proof command listed `pnpm exec playwright test --grep kv_cache_panel`; existing inference_lab pattern uses Vitest + @testing-library/react. Implemented as Vitest tests.
design_notes: Hidden-not-greyed cascade: panel hides when supportsKvQuantization='none' AND supportsKvPrefixCache=false; quant picker hides separately when supportsKvQuantization='none' (prefix slider remains); prefix controls hide separately when supportsKvPrefixCache=false (quant picker remains).
quantOptionsFor() exported from kv_cache.ts and unit-tested: 'none' → []; 'q4' → ['none','q4']; 'q8' → ['none','q8']; 'q4_q8_mix' → all four.
Live occupancy polling capped at OCCUPANCY_POLL_MS = 2000ms via window.setInterval with cancelRef cleanup on unmount.
Evict-all uses a two-step confirm dialog to satisfy red_team minimum control 'prevent accidental cache wipe under load'.
A/B compare (AC-INFER-LAB-UI-AB-COMPARE) deferred to a follow-up MT; no generation IPC exposed (same residual_risk as MT-091).
owned_file_changes: ADDED app/src/lib/ipc/kv_cache.ts (160 lines): IPC binding + quantOptionsFor helper.

focused_vitest.note: 10/10 passed: hidden-not-greyed cascade (both caps absent / capabilities=null); panel renders with live occupancy + hit-rate math; quant picker hides when None; prefix controls hide when no prefix-cache; quant picker dispatches kvSetQuantization with Work Profile settings; evict-all opens confirm dialog and only dispatches on confirm; cancel skips IPC; occupancy fetch error surfaces inline; quantOptionsFor cascade.

full_vitest.note: 73/73 across 16 files. No regression from new panel + InferenceLab wiring.

residual_risks: No Integration Validator has reviewed MT-094.
A/B compare (AC-INFER-LAB-UI-AB-COMPARE) not implemented — same deferred follow-up as MT-091.
Live polling cadence enforcement is verified by source-inspection (OCCUPANCY_POLL_MS=2000) — vitest cannot easily assert real-time interval behavior without flaky fake-timer tests.
Umbrella gov-check failures inherited from prior MTs remain.

out_of_scope_self_evaluation.why: MT-094 owned files declared Svelte components; the React/TSX equivalents land as KvCachePanel.tsx + KvCachePanel.test.tsx + InferenceLab.tsx + index.ts (export). Same Svelte->TSX defect class as MT-091. The new app/src/lib/ipc/kv_cache.ts is outside the owned-file list.
touched_outside_mt_owned_files: app/src/lib/ipc/kv_cache.ts (ADDED) — IPC binding wrapping the MT-093 kv_cache Tauri commands; required for the panel to dispatch.
out_of_scope_self_evaluation.risk_reduced: Same as MT-091: prevents the panel from being a paper UI and centralizes the camelCase DTO + quantOptionsFor helper in one binding module.

integration_validator_review.verdict_reason: KV cache panel implements hidden-not-greyed cascade, quant picker, prefix TTL slider, occupancy polling, evict-all with confirm dialog; A/B compare (AC-INFER-LAB-UI-AB-COMPARE) deferred and same poll-flood concern as MT-091 (covered by 2s cap constant).

integration_validator_review_prior.verdict_reason: KV cache panel implements hidden-not-greyed cascade, quant picker, prefix TTL slider, occupancy polling, evict-all with confirm dialog; A/B compare (AC-INFER-LAB-UI-AB-COMPARE) deferred and same poll-flood concern as MT-091 (covered by 2s cap constant).
